name: Anoto Group AB (publ)
summary: Anoto Group AB (publ) provides digital writing and drawing solutions in Sweden and internationally. It offers solutions, including ACE, a cloud based forms system that offers paper document handling and business process automation; Anoto DNA, an interactive security and marketing solution; and Dr. Watson, a biometric authentication and security solution. It also offers KAIT, an AI solution for offline education; and designs and manufactures smart pens under the Livescribe name. The company provides its products, applications, and services to the business, consumer, and education markets. Anoto Group AB (publ) was founded in 1996 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
